code:
import string
import io
import list

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    match parts.get(i)
    when Some(p)
      match string.parse_int(p)
      when Some(n)
        nums = list.push(nums, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  # insertion sort
  mut a = nums
  mut j = 1
  while j < a.len()
    mut k = j
    while k > 0
      match a.get(k - 1)
      when Some(left)
        match a.get(k)
        when Some(cur)
          if left > cur
            mut nb: List<Int> = []
            mut t = 0
            while t < a.len()
              match a.get(t)
              when Some(v)
                if t == k - 1
                  nb = list.push(nb, cur)
                else if t == k
                  nb = list.push(nb, left)
                else
                  nb = list.push(nb, v)
                end
              when None
                ()
              end
              t = t + 1
            end
            a = nb
            k = k - 1
          else
            k = 0
          end
        when None
          k = 0
        end
      when None
        k = 0
      end
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut m = 0
  while m < a.len()
    match a.get(m)
    when Some(v)
      if m == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    m = m + 1
  end
  println(out)
when None
  println("")
end
